claims.text: Replace every value with your own thresholds and goals.
# Update these as your fitness changes.

# Cycling ftp: 250 # Functional Threshold Power (watts) # Running rftp: 360 # Threshold pace in sec/km (6'00" = 360s) # Heart Rate threshold_hr: 165 # Lactate threshold HR (bpm) max_hr: 185 # Max HR (bpm) resting_hr: 55 # Resting HR (bpm) # Body weight_kg: 70 # Events (priority: A = key race, B = important, C = tune-up) events: - name: "Local 10K" date: 2026-09-01 priority: A goal_time: "0:42:00" goal_pace_per_km: "4:12" notes: "Example A race.
